new_translation: Nhân viên khách sạn đặc biệt lịch sự với tất cả khách hàng.

old_example: The atmosphere in the courtroom was tense as the jury prepared to deliver their final verdict in the high-profile trial.
new_example: The atmosphere in the courtroom was tense during the trial.
new_translation: Bầu không khí trong phòng xử án rất căng thẳng khi xét xử.

old_example: She served cheese and crackers as an appetizer before the main course was ready.
new_example: She served cheese and crackers as an appetizer.
new_translation: Cô ấy đã dọn phô mai và bánh quy mặn làm món khai vị.

old_example: The antique furniture was highly valued for its exquisite craftsmanship and the high quality of the materials used in its construction.
new_example: The antique furniture was valued for its exquisite craftsmanship.
new_translation: Đồ nội thất cổ được đánh giá cao vì kỹ năng thủ công tinh xảo.

old_example: The local craft market features a wide variety of handmade products created by skilled craftspeople from the surrounding area.
new_example: The market features products created by skilled craftspeople.
new_translation: Chợ có các sản phẩm được tạo ra bởi thợ thủ công lành nghề.

old_example: Everyone in the crowd craned their necks to get a glimpse of the visiting dignitary.
new_example: Everyone in the crowd craned their necks to see the visitor.
new_translation: Mọi người trong đám đông đều rướn cổ để nhìn vị khách.

old_example: The traffic was so bad that cars were forced to crawl along the highway.
new_example: Traffic was so bad that cars were forced to crawl.
new_translation: Giao thông tệ đến mức xe cộ phải bò trên đường.

old_example: The young artist used a box of colorful crayons to draw a picture of his family and their pet dog.
new_example: The artist used crayons to draw a picture of his family.
new_translation: Họa sĩ nhí đã dùng bút màu sáp để vẽ tranh gia đình.

old_example: The creator of the popular social media platform decided to step down as CEO.
new_example: The creator of the social media platform stepped down as CEO.
new_translation: Người sáng tạo nền tảng truyền thông xã hội đã từ chức CEO.

old_example: The deep ocean is home to many mysterious and fascinating creatures that are rarely seen by humans.
new_example: The deep ocean is home to many mysterious creatures.
new_translation: Đại dương sâu thẳm là nơi cư ngụ của nhiều sinh vật bí ẩn.

old_example: The applicant's impressive academic credentials and extensive work experience made her the top candidate for the executive position.
new_example: Her impressive credentials made her the top candidate for the position.
new_translation: Bằng cấp ấn tượng giúp cô trở thành ứng cử viên hàng đầu.

old_example: The old, abandoned house on the edge of town had a creepy atmosphere that discouraged any local children from going near it.
new_example: The abandoned house had a creepy atmosphere.
new_translation: Ngôi nhà bỏ hoang có một bầu không khí rùng mình.

old_example: He decided to study criminology at university to understand the social factors that contribute to criminal behavior.
new_example: He decided to study criminology to understand criminal behavior.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã quyết định học tội phạm học để hiểu hành vi tội phạm.

old_example: The success of the project depends critically on our ability to meet the tight deadline.
new_example: The success of the project depends critically on the deadline.
new_translation: Thành công của dự án phụ thuộc quan trọng vào thời hạn.

old_example: He reached a crossroads in his career and had to make a big decision.
new_example: He reached a crossroads in his career and made a decision.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã đến bước ngoặt sự nghiệp và đưa ra quyết định.

old_example: The hunter had to crouch low in the tall grass to avoid being seen by the deer while he slowly approached.
new_example: The hunter had to crouch low in the tall grass.
new_translation: Người thợ săn đã phải cúi mình thấp trong đám cỏ cao.

old_example: The team suffered a crushing defeat in the final match, losing by five goals to their main rivals.
new_example: The team suffered a crushing defeat in the final match.
new_translation: Đội bóng đã phải chịu một thất bại áp đảo trong trận chung kết.

old_example: He wore a pair of elegant silver cufflinks to complement his formal suit for the gala dinner.
new_example: He wore silver cufflinks to complement his formal suit.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã đeo khuy măng sét bạc cho bộ vest trang trọng.

old_example: The city is culturally diverse, with residents from dozens of different countries sharing their traditions and cuisines.
new_example: The city is culturally diverse, with residents from many countries.
new_translation: Thành phố đa dạng văn hóa với cư dân từ nhiều nước.

old_example: The new luxury car model features multiple cupholders in both the front and back seats for the convenience of the passengers.
new_example: The new car features multiple cupholders for the passengers.
new_translation: Mẫu xe mới có nhiều khay để ly cho hành khách.

old_example: The museum curator is responsible for organizing the new exhibition of contemporary African art.
new_example: The curator is responsible for organizing the new exhibition.
new_translation: Người phụ trách chịu trách nhiệm tổ chức triển lãm mới.

old_example: Many restaurants began offering curbside pickup during the pandemic to allow customers to get their meals without entering the building.
new_example: Many restaurants offered curbside pickup during the pandemic.
new_translation: Nhiều nhà hàng đã cung cấp dịch vụ lấy hàng tại lề đường.

old_example: The young scientist's natural curiosity led her to spend hours in the laboratory experimenting with new chemical reactions.
new_example: Her natural curiosity led her to experiment with new reactions.
new_translation: Sự tò mò tự nhiên thôi thúc cô thử nghiệm phản ứng mới.

old_example: The road through the mountains was extremely curvy, making it a challenging but beautiful drive.
new_example: The road through the mountains was extremely curvy and beautiful.
new_translation: Con đường băng qua những ngọn núi vô cùng uốn lượn và đẹp.

old_example: The software offers a highly customizable interface, allowing users to rearrange tools according to their preferences.
new_example: The software offers a highly customizable interface for users.
new_translation: Phần mềm cung cấp một giao diện có thể tùy chỉnh cho người dùng.

old_example: The software allows for a high degree of customization to suit each user's needs.
new_example: The software allows for customization to suit each user's needs.
new_translation: Phần mềm cho phép tùy chỉnh để phù hợp nhu cầu người dùng.

old_example: Motorists are reminded to be patient and give plenty of room to cyclists on the road.
new_example: Motorists are reminded to give room to cyclists on the road.
new_translation: Người lái xe được nhắc nhở nhường không gian cho người đi xe đạp.

old_example: The manager provides a daily briefing to keep all employees informed about company news.
new_example: The manager provides a daily briefing for all employees.
new_translation: Quản lý cung cấp buổi tóm tắt hàng ngày cho mọi nhân viên.

old_example: He has a severe dairy allergy and always checks food labels for milk or cheese ingredients.
new_example: He has a dairy allergy and checks labels for milk ingredients.
new_translation: Anh ấy bị dị ứng sữa và kiểm tra nhãn thành phần sữa.

old_example: The leaked documents had a very damaging effect on the company's reputation and stock price.
new_example: The leaked documents had a damaging effect on the company's reputation.
new_translation: Các tài liệu rò rỉ tác động tiêu cực đến uy tín công ty.

old_example: Engineers were concerned about the dangerousness of the chemical reaction and implemented strict safety protocols.
new_example: Engineers were concerned about the dangerousness of the reaction.
new_translation: Các kỹ sư lo ngại về mức độ nguy hiểm của phản ứng.

old_example: The old filing system is outdated and needs to be replaced with a modern one.
new_example: The old filing system is dated and needs replacement.
new_translation: Hệ thống lưu trữ cũ đã lỗi thời và cần được thay thế.

old_example: Please mark the important dates for the upcoming international marketing campaign on your calendar.
new_example: Please mark the important dates for the campaign on your calendar.
new_translation: Vui lòng đánh dấu những ngày quan trọng của chiến dịch vào lịch.

old_example: His daughter recently earned a degree in computer science from a prestigious international university.
new_example: His daughter earned a degree from a prestigious university.
new_translation: Con gái ông mới nhận bằng từ một trường đại học uy tín.

old_example: Mr. Miller decided to step down as CEO to spend more time with his two young daughters.
new_example: Mr. Miller stepped down to spend time with his daughters.
new_translation: Ông Miller từ chức để dành thời gian cho các con gái.

old_example: Today is a busy day for the international marketing team as they launch the project.
new_example: Today is a busy day for the marketing team.
new_translation: Hôm nay là một ngày bận rộn đối với đội ngũ tiếp thị.

old_example: Solar panels generate maximum electricity during the daytime when sunlight is strongest and most direct.
new_example: Solar panels generate maximum electricity during the daytime.
new_translation: Pin mặt trời tạo ra lượng điện tối đa vào ban ngày.

old_example: The battery in my laptop is dead, so I need to find a power outlet.
new_example: The battery is dead, so I need an outlet.
new_translation: Pin đã hết, vì vậy tôi cần một ổ cắm điện.

old_example: The manager emphasized the importance of meeting the final deadline for the international project.
new_example: The manager emphasized the importance of meeting the deadline.
new_translation: Quản lý nhấn mạnh tầm quan trọng của việc đáp ứng thời hạn.
